title: Ahtna Declares Largest Shareholder Dividend in 10 Years
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – On November 19, 2016, in accordance with the Earnings Distribution Policy, the Ahtna, Inc. Board of Directors formally declared a shareholder dividend for 2016 of $5.75, or $575 per 100 shares. This is an increase of $1.32 per share from last year’s dividend and the highest divid...
